baseline.observed: npm run test:ui emitted Node ExperimentalWarning output for every check run because the helper tests use --experimental-transform-types.

change.summary: Added --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning to the UI helper test script while keeping the same Node transformer and test files.

verification.result: PASS: 9 Node UI helper tests passed and the output did not include ExperimentalWarning.
PASS: 9 quiet UI helper tests, Vite build, 31 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: No test files or application behavior changed.
The TypeScript transform remains explicit in the test command.
The full check gate still runs the UI tests before build and Rust checks.
